reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 3 (Code Verification) confirmed Phase 03's reading. Gossip path enforces full validation: signature verification (data_column_verification.rs:705-723), inclusion proof (line 502), and KZG (line 507). RPC/sync path (data_availability_checker.rs:434-448) performs ONLY KZG validation (line 446), then immediately marks columns as Available (lines 467-475) BEFORE block signature verification occurs (block_verification.rs:1326 vs 1333). An attacker can respond to DataColumnsByRange with columns having valid KZG proofs but forged signatures or invalid merkle proofs. Columns pass KZG check, get wrapped in AvailableBlock, and could be used for reconstruction or imported without detecting forgery. Spec reference: 01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json line 642-657 requires 'forall msg from P2P: processed(msg) => fully_validated(msg) == true'. Severity: High per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json (affects >33% network if Lighthouse market share is >33%; triggers protocol violations and potential data availability failures).
reviewed_items.spec_reference: P2P peers are untrusted; all P2P input must be fully validated before acceptance. (forall msg from P2P: processed(msg) => fully_validated(msg) == true)
